positive: A retro-futuristic 1950s space travel poster featuring a stylized rocket ship flying past stylized planets and moons. Limited color palette of mustard yellow, teal blue, and burnt orange. Mid-century modern design, distressed screen print texture, bold typography layout.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealism, modern gradients, messy composition
